> **Heads up.** Vais.Agents is pre-alpha; scope is narrow and cadence is driven by the maintainers. Please open an issue first — large unsolicited PRs may be rejected on scope even if technically fine. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? Describe the scenario, not the proposed change. Concrete examples help. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- The shape you have in mind. API surface, behaviour, configuration, sample. Code sketches are great. -->

```csharp
// API sketch
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you already tried, or other API shapes you considered. -->

## Impact

- Affected package(s): `<e.g. Vais.Agents.Core, Vais.Agents.Abstractions>`
- Public API surface: `<new types? new methods? breaking change?>`
- Stack-neutral? `<yes / SK-only / MAF-only / hosting-only>`
- Docs / samples touched: `<which doc pages, which samples>`

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to open a PR for this (with maintainer guidance on scope).
- [ ] I'd prefer the maintainers implement it.
